hero.title: Global Hub for Preschooling & Montessori Training
hero.subtitle: Join our interactive online preschool for kids or kickstart your career with our International Montessori Teacher Training Course (TTC).

preview.title: Excellence in Early Childhood Education
preview.description: Kinder Prime International provides a dual platform: a joyful, structured online preschool for Pre-KG to UKG, and a professional Montessori TTC program for aspiring teachers worldwide.

teacherTraining.description: Transform your passion for teaching into a professional career with our comprehensive online Montessori TTC.

reviews.name: Anjali Krishna
reviews.text: The Montessori TTC course is life-changing. The flexible timings helped me manage my home while studying.

reviews.name: Aisha Rahman
reviews.text: Very engaging classes. My child enjoys learning every day and has improved a lot in communication.

reviews.name: Sneha P.
reviews.text: I got placed in a reputed school immediately after finishing my TTC here. Highly recommended!
